title: Shared Health
description: A lightweight mod that allows players to share a collective health/hunger value.
body:
# Shared Health
A Minecraft mod that allows players to share their health and/or hunger values across an entire server.

# Installation
As of now, this mod only supports **Fabric 1.16.5 and 1.19.4+**, although due to it's simplistic nature, it can be easily ported to other versions and mod loaders.

*Fabric API is required.*

# Usage
The mod's features can be enabled through Minecraft's native gamerule system.

- Health Sharing can be enabled through the `shareHealth` gamerule *(enabled by default)*
- Hunger Sharing can be enabled through the `shareHunger` gamerule *(enabled by default)*

Thank you to AsianHalfSquat for featuring this mod! Check his video out here:

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AGVYAjJihYo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AGVYAjJihYo)
